generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/dtdf"
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RoomTemperatureSensor, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2
]

instance SimulatedTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated temperature data from dynamic models for real-time monitoring"
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of temperature violations for system safety"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive state estimation for temperature control"
]

instance BangBangControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control action for temperature regulation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TemperatureSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature simulation using calibrated dynamic models (Model A and Model B)",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulatedTemperatureInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for temperature fault detection",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for predictive temperature control",
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control for temperature regulation",
    DTDFVocab:provides BangBangControlAction
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based simulation engine for real-time temperature simulation using calibrated models",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureSimulationService
]

instance ScipyOptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy non-linear least squares optimizer for model calibration",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureSimulationService
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for real-time data transmission between physical sensors and virtual components",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureSimulationService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, BangBangControlService
]

instance RaspberryPiEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for running DT components and handling GPIO operations",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureSimulationService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, BangBangControlService, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator
]

instance OneWireProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire communication protocol for sensor connectivity",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureSimulationService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, BangBangControlService
]

instance PCBDesignEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom PCB design with MOSFETs (4A handling) and optocouplers for signal isolation",
    DTDFVocab:enables HeatbedActuator, FanActuator
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from DS18S20 sensors transmitted via RabbitMQ",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, SimulationEnabler
]

instance CalibrationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor data from experiments used for model calibration",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizerEnabler
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model for energy transfer between air and environment with 2 parameters",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model including heatbed thermal inertia with 4 parameters",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance RoomTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring room temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to +85°C)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal box temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to +85°C)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal box temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to +85°C)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for heating and fan operations"
]

instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs (4A handling) and optocouplers for signal isolation"
]

instance RaspberryPi : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed actuator controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on custom PCB for heating"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan actuator controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on custom PCB for air circulation"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, PowerSupply, CustomPCB, RaspberryPi, RoomTemperatureSensor, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator,
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system comprising styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume), 214x214x3 mm heatbed, fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow, three DS18S20 temperature sensors (one for room temperature, two for internal box temperature), Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) generated by the DT controller are transmitted via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes them through the PCB's MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ-based communication architecture where controller, low-level driver, and simulation models interact through message passing, forming a cohesive system for DT operations."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated'), where models are integrated post-deployment for ongoing monitoring and control of the physical incubator."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated against experimental data; Model B's four-parameter version better predicts thermal inertia, with calibration minimizing residual error via Scipy's optimizer."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ AMQP protocol over Ethernet/Wi-Fi (Raspberry Pi's built-in networking) for inter-component communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "On-premises deployment on Raspberry Pi 4 hardware."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into low-level driver to maintain device safety; optocouplers provide electrical isolation between control signals and high-current components."
]
